compatibility_evidence: The component is process-governance content and is integrated as an independently versioned playbook.
The current Ordo language and framework baselines are later backward-compatible additive release candidates.
The source package declares no requirement to downgrade the integrated baseline.
The component package checksum, identities, JSON, YAML, and internal manifest were verified.
limitations: Declared dependency versions remain historical and were not rewritten.
No full real-model benchmark campaign was rerun solely for this packaging integration.
Integration status applies to package structure and declared contract compatibility, not production promotion of the alpha playbook.
